factors.name: spec_complexity
factors.description: Product of spec count × event count — higher = more branching logic

factors.name: slice_type
factors.description: Slice type risk — processors and enrichments have more moving parts

factors.name: prior_failure_rate
factors.description: Historical failure rate from run intelligence

factors.name: blast_radius
factors.description: Count of downstream projections + enrichments consuming this slice's events

factors.name: field_types
factors.description: Presence of complex field types increases risk

factors.name: spec_novelty
factors.description: How different this spec is from previously implemented slices (1.0 = fully novel)

factors.name: todo_density
factors.description: Number of TODO placeholders in scaffold output
